## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webflow and GrowthX teams to discuss ongoing content and integration projects.](https://fathom.video/share/ijyVGZQU-QP1tRbPyaUk-f8tW8mMDEZa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration guide awaiting final review; publishing process to be streamlined](https://fathom.video/share/ijyVGZQU-QP1tRbPyaUk-f8tW8mMDEZa?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [SEO content progressing with one article ready for publication](https://fathom.video/share/ijyVGZQU-QP1tRbPyaUk-f8tW8mMDEZa?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Listicle topics being refined to avoid overlap with existing content](https://fathom.video/share/ijyVGZQU-QP1tRbPyaUk-f8tW8mMDEZa?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Integration categories to be reviewed and potentially reorganized for better UX](https://fathom.video/share/ijyVGZQU-QP1tRbPyaUk-f8tW8mMDEZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

## Topics

### Integration Guide and Publishing Process

  - [40+ integrations in hold status to be published, with updates made based on comments](https://fathom.video/share/ijyVGZQU-QP1tRbPyaUk-f8tW8mMDEZa?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
